GCP_PROJECT_ID.description: BigQuery project ID for dbt development.

DBT_USER.description: Short identifier used for the dbt_dev_<user> dataset.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Optional: OpenAI API key for dbt Wizard BYOK provider setup.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Optional: Anthropic API key for dbt Wizard BYOK provider setup.

DBT_WIZARD_AUTH_JSON.description: Optional: Contents of ~/.dbt/wizard/auth.json from a completed local dbt Wizard login.
